Lee Szuba About

About

I am a 3A Electrical Engineering student at the University of Waterloo.

My interests currently lie in radio frequency circuits, power electronics, and analog and mixed signal design. I enjoy working on all kinds of electronics projects in my spare time.

I also have a keen interest in robotics, and many of my robots have been successful in competition. My current project is a software defined radio receiver, based on an FPGA and GNU Radio, alongside some custom hardware. For details, check out the project links.

You can also look at my resume for more details.

Lee Szuba
University of Waterloo
Electrical Engineering Student
